blocking_findings.required_fix: Resolve the contradiction between implementation evidence and P27 plan state.
Add structured split_evidence to the manifest root entry.
Provide a full inventory mapping all 26 original test names to shard destinations.

repairs: Updated LFA-P27 plan rows so P27.3 and P27.4 reflect completed implementation/evidence while P27.5 moved through review_pending before delta.
Added manifest split_evidence for test/autonomous-scheduler-loop.test.js with parity artifact path, 26 before / 26 after counts, 877 to 339 line counts, moved domains, and retained domains.
Extended docs/examples/autonomous-scheduler-loop-test-p27-split-parity.json with top-level before_count/after_count, 26-row moved_tests mapping, and domain_summary.
decision: PASS after delta. DeepSeek confirmed the three initial blockers were closed and no new blocker was introduced.
